ComfyPencil.Settings.AutoSaveMs.name: Studio autosave delay
ComfyPencil.Settings.AutoSaveMs.tooltip: How long the studio waits after a paint or layer change before saving to disk.

ComfyPencil.Settings.ShowNodeButton.name: Show Open Studio button on nodes
ComfyPencil.Settings.ShowNodeButton.tooltip: Expose a direct Open Studio button on each Comfy Pencil Studio node.
